attributes.name: AsAttendanceListener
attributes.description: Marks a service as a subscriber to attendance lifecycle events. AbsenceFreezeThresholdReached (P1) and NoShowFeeCharged (P1) require explicit opt-in — they route on notifications-critical queue.

params.name: events
params.description: Empty = subscribe to every Stackra\Sports\Attendance\Events\* event EXCEPT the P1 events (AbsenceFreezeThresholdReached, NoShowFeeCharged) — explicit opt-in required.
